title: Tanice Kids Dinnerware Set, 12PCS Plates and Bowls, Plastic Dishes for Kitchen and Outdoor Camping
features: Safety and Lightweight: Constructed with PP plastic, these dinnerware sets are unbreakable and lightweight, making them easy to handle; They are more durable than ceramic, reducing the risk of breakage

Complete Table Service for 4: This dinnerware set includes 12 pieces, serving 4 people with dinner plates, cereal bowls, and cups in multicolor; Perfect for everyday meals, gatherings, and outdoor activities like picnics

Microwave and Dishwasher Safe: These plates and bowls are dishwasher and microwave safe, making them easy to clean and suitablefor everyday use; The smooth surface and stackable design with rounded edges save space in your kitchen cabinet

Multipurpose Usage: this dinnerware set is perfect for parties, picnics, camping, and everyday use at home, school, or the office; With sizes tailored for both families and children, it caters to a range of occasions with ease

Idea Gift Choice: This unbreakable dinnerware set is a great alternative to single-use plastic cutlery and dishes. It serves as a meaningful and practical gift for occasions like Christmas, housewarming, birthdays, and more, promoting colorful living
description: Product Description Kitchen Accessary Automatic Vacuum Sealer Sous Vide 12 Pack Spice Jars Set Surface Material ABS Material ABS+Stainless Steel Material Stainless Steel Features Ideal for preserving home-cooked meals, snacks , or even for outdoor adventures Features Sous Vide Machine preserves nutrients with vacuum micro-therm and slow boiling Features Each seasoning tin has a rotating design with sift and pour holes
